parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the flanger. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Range: Sets the lower limit of the flanger sweep. Higher values result in wider, more dramatic sweeps.
parameters-en.Enhance: Controls the amount of feedback in the effected signal.
parameters-en.Manual: Controls the degree of phase shifting. Has no effect when Range is set to 100%.
parameters-en.Harmonic: Selects an Even or Odd harmonic relationship between the passband peaks.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
